# AUTOGENERATED at runtime by noctalia from home/noctalia/templates/gtk-theme-trigger.txt.
# Edits are overwritten on the next theme change.
#
# Trigger-only template: it carries no real config. Its post_hook
# (noctalia-gtk-theme) writes the actual gtk-{3,4}.0/settings.ini. {{mode}}
# renders to dark|light and is passed to the hook as the authoritative current
# mode — settings.json darkMode is stale at hook time because noctalia writes
# settings.json only AFTER firing post_hooks.
mode = {{mode}}
